title: Beach Sand Toys Set, 26 Pieces, Construction Vehicles with Collapsible Bucket, Mesh Storage Bag
features: COMPLETE SET: 26-piece beach toy collection including sand moulds, construction vehicles, spades, and rakes for endless seaside fun
STORAGE SOLUTION: Comes with a durable mesh bag and collapsible bucket for easy transport and storage when not in use
VARIETY OF MOULDS: Features castle, sea creature, and vehicle-shaped moulds in vibrant colours to create imaginative sand sculptures
CONSTRUCTION TOYS: Includes sturdy dump trucks and diggers perfect for sand pit construction play activities
PORTABLE DESIGN: Collapsible bucket saves space while the lightweight, durable plastic construction makes it ideal for beach outings
SPECIAL NOTE： The accessories in the beach toy set you received may have different colors, and the colors are randomly shipped. Please be aware of this.
description: Product description Transform beach and sandbox play with this comprehensive 26-piece sand toy set, perfect for young builders and creative minds. The collection features vibrant, durable construction vehicles including dump trucks and diggers, alongside classic sand castle building essentials. The set comes with a practical collapsible bucket that saves space when not in use, and includes an assortment of colourful moulds in fun shapes like sea creatures, castles, and hands. Children will love using the rake and spade to create their masterpieces in the sand. All pieces are sized appropriately for toddlers and young children to handle easily. The included mesh storage bag keeps everything organised and allows sand to fall through, making cleanup a breeze. These toys are ideal for developing fine motor skills and encouraging imaginative play at the beach, in the garden, or at the park. The sturdy construction ensures hours of entertainment for boys and girls alike. Safety Warning NO
